objective: 전 레포 자원과 잘사용해서 프레임워크 완성할때까지 달리자

requirements.title: README gives a 30-second understanding path
requirements.boundary: local repository evidence only; does not prove external adoption or publication

requirements.title: Framework has a 5-minute execution path
requirements.boundary: local repository evidence only; does not prove external adoption or publication

requirements.title: Mimesis file protocol and loop are present
requirements.boundary: local repository evidence only; does not prove external adoption or publication

requirements.title: AI-native structure is exposed
requirements.boundary: local repository evidence only; does not prove external adoption or publication

requirements.title: Originality and proof boundary are explicit
requirements.boundary: local repository evidence only; does not prove external adoption or publication

requirements.title: Local release preflight is wired
requirements.boundary: local repository evidence only; does not prove external adoption or publication

requirements.title: Strict publish sync gate
requirements.nextAction: Clean or intentionally publish local changes, then rerun the strict sync gate.
requirements.boundary: Does not stage, commit, push, tag, release, or publish.

requirements.title: Owner license decision
requirements.nextAction: Owner chooses a reuse license or keeps the no-reuse boundary.
requirements.boundary: Does not choose a license or provide legal advice.

requirements.title: Permissioned external weak artifact
requirements.nextAction: Collect one user-submitted, permissioned, or clearly redacted weak artifact.
requirements.boundary: Does not create external proof or grant permission.

requirements.title: Completed permissioned before/after case
requirements.nextAction: Run the reviewed artifact through the full case path and preserve the boundary check.
requirements.boundary: Does not prove improvement, adoption, or outcome until the before/after case evidence exists.

requirements.title: npm package publication
requirements.nextAction: After license and sync gates close, owner decides whether npm publication is in scope.
requirements.boundary: Dry-run package checks are not npm publication.

requirements.title: Tagged GitHub Action or Marketplace publication
requirements.nextAction: Owner decides whether a tagged public action release or Marketplace listing is in scope.
requirements.boundary: Repository-local action metadata is not Marketplace publication.

requirements.title: Shipped plugin or connector proof
requirements.nextAction: Produce a real tagged plugin/action release or installation proof before shipped-plugin claims.
requirements.boundary: Local plugin scaffolds and install-readiness packets are not shipped plugins.

requirements.title: Benchmarked productivity evidence
requirements.nextAction: Run the measurement protocol and review the resulting evidence before productivity claims.
requirements.boundary: Measurement protocol only; no benchmark claim without direct evidence.

requirements.title: External adoption evidence
requirements.nextAction: Collect and review real external usage evidence before adoption claims.
requirements.boundary: Read-only public repository visibility is not external adoption.

allowedClaim: Mimesis has a local goal completion audit that maps objective evidence and open gates without making a completion claim.
disallowedClaim: The goal completion audit does not prove completion, does not mark the active goal complete, does not close gates, does not publish, does not choose a license, does not create external proof, and does not prove adoption.
